title: sphaeralcea caroliniana
intro: Sphaeralcea caroliniana, also known as the Carolina Globe Mallow, is a perennial plant species native to the southeastern United States. It belongs to the mallow family and is known for its vibrant orange or yellow flowers. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been attributed to its high content of flavonoids and saponins. Herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures can be made from the plant's roots and flowers, providing benefits such as relief from digestive issues, skin irritations, and respiratory problems.
